name: simipour
flavor_texts: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.
The high-pressure water expelled from its tail is so powerful, it can destroy a concrete wall.
It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.
text: Simipour is the Geyser Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: gluttony, torrent (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 98, Defense: 63, Sp. Atk: 98, Sp. Def: 63, Speed: 101. Evolution line: panpour → simipour. Lore: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail. The high-pressure water expelled from its tail is so powerful, it can destroy a concrete wall. It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.
